body.title: Add /api/system_health — cluster resource visibility
body.result: Added GET /api/system_health to web/server.py. Returns JSON list of cluster machines (name, ollama_host, healthy, load_score, response_ms, active_models, primary_model, reasoning_model, network_type, ram_gb) plus override and ts. Reads from cached router state (no re-probe on each call). 6 tests added in tests/test_system_health.py; 110/110 suite green.
body.description: Add /api/system_health endpoint to Igor web server showing cluster resource state. #232
